title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
VMware India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
